creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your submission :)

Note, this port has no maintainer, so please feel free to include an update to MAINTAINER in your patch.

Additionally, QA output (as attachments) would be helpful in progressing this update:

- Output of portlint -AC (after addressing any issues)
- Output of poudriere testport or bulk -t' (highly preferred), OR
- Output of make stage && make check-plist && make stage-qa && make package.
